mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ${prefix}HISTORY_DELETION ( RESOURCE_KEY, BATCH_OPERATION_KEY, RESOURCE_TYPE, PARTITION_ID ) VALUES ( #{resourceKey}, #{batchOperationKey}, #{resourceType}, #{partitionId} ) ON CONFLICT (RESOURCE_KEY, BATCH_OPERATION_KEY) DO NOTHING

INSERT INTO ${prefix}HISTORY_DELETION ( RESOURCE_KEY, BATCH_OPERATION_KEY, RESOURCE_TYPE, PARTITION_ID ) VALUES ( #{resourceKey}, #{batchOperationKey}, #{resourceType}, #{partitionId} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE RESOURCE_KEY = RESOURCE_KEY

INSERT INTO ${prefix}HISTORY_DELETION ( RESOURCE_KEY, BATCH_OPERATION_KEY, RESOURCE_TYPE, PARTITION_ID ) VALUES ( #{resourceKey}, #{batchOperationKey}, #{resourceType}, #{partitionId} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE RESOURCE_KEY = RESOURCE_KEY

MERGE INTO ${prefix}HISTORY_DELETION hd USING dual ON (hd.RESOURCE_KEY = #{resourceKey} AND hd.BATCH_OPERATION_KEY = #{batchOperationKey}) WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (RESOURCE_KEY, BATCH_OPERATION_KEY, RESOURCE_TYPE, PARTITION_ID) VALUES (#{resourceKey}, #{batchOperationKey}, #{resourceType}, #{partitionId})

MERGE INTO ${prefix}HISTORY_DELETION hd USING (SELECT #{resourceKey} AS RESOURCE_KEY, #{batchOperationKey} AS BATCH_OPERATION_KEY FROM dual) src ON (hd.RESOURCE_KEY = src.RESOURCE_KEY AND hd.BATCH_OPERATION_KEY = src.BATCH_OPERATION_KEY) WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (RESOURCE_KEY, BATCH_OPERATION_KEY, RESOURCE_TYPE, PARTITION_ID) VALUES (#{resourceKey}, #{batchOperationKey}, #{resourceType}, #{partitionId})

MERGE ${prefix}HISTORY_DELETION AS target USING (SELECT #{resourceKey} AS RESOURCE_KEY, #{batchOperationKey} AS BATCH_OPERATION_KEY, #{resourceType} AS RESOURCE_TYPE, #{partitionId} AS PARTITION_ID) AS source ON (target.RESOURCE_KEY = source.RESOURCE_KEY AND target.BATCH_OPERATION_KEY = source.BATCH_OPERATION_KEY) WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (RESOURCE_KEY, BATCH_OPERATION_KEY, RESOURCE_TYPE, PARTITION_ID) VALUES (source.RESOURCE_KEY, source.BATCH_OPERATION_KEY, source.RESOURCE_TYPE, source.PARTITION_ID);
mapper.select: SELECT TOP (#{limit}) * FROM ${prefix}HISTORY_DELETION WHERE PARTITION_ID = #{partitionId} ORDER BY BATCH_OPERATION_KEY, RESOURCE_KEY
